Leviathianic Virtual Book Club

About Our Club

Reader, my name is Fernando. I work with Alexander, our web developer, to moderate our club. This is not something we do for fun, or as a joke, or to make money. We demand members show the proper reverence to the club and its principles.

Rules

  1. Be Beautiful: Easy. Ugly people, please refrain from submitting your thoughts. We do not care.
  2. Be Sincere: You are not here to impress me or Alexander. You have nothing to prove. Expose yourself or move on to a different club.
  3. Thoughtful Submissions Only: Your AI-generated analysis has no power here. Use your brain or leave.
  4. Submission Format: We require each submission to include the name, date of birth, mother's maiden name, and a brief personal experience. We genuinely believe that it's none of your business what we do with this information!
  5. HAVE FUN!: Some of these submissions are from real people, some from imaginary people. More anonymity means more FUN! The woke left cannot reach you here.
